g.text: FABIO taxes less subsidies per item for St. Vincent and the Grenadines (VCT) — a FABIO-internal
decomposition; the World Bank reference is TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. No external strand benchmark
covers this country. Items grouped as "Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below 3% max |share| of WB
across years). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs processing (ISIC-C).
FABIO taxes less subsidies [COMBINED_GLORIA] — St. Vincent and the Grenadines (VCT) (value-added sub-account)
Taxes less subsidies on production (current US$)
Taxes less subsidies on production (current US$)
